title: Commons Integration
description: Commons provides a collaborative workspace that connects Parthenon to shared research infrastructure, enabling teams to publish, discover, and import analytical assets such as cohort definitions, concept sets, and study packages from a curated community repository. It is powered by Abby AI integration for intelligent asset recommendations.
tips: Search Commons before building a new cohort or concept set — a validated community-contributed asset may already exist for your clinical area.
When publishing assets to Commons, include a clear description, clinical rationale, and validation status so that other researchers can assess fitness for use.
Use the Abby AI assistant within Commons to get natural-language recommendations for related phenotypes and evidence sources.
Imported assets from Commons are copies — you can safely customize them for your local data without affecting the shared original.
Periodically check Commons for updated versions of phenotypes you have previously imported, particularly after major OHDSI vocabulary releases.
